title: 11 Herbal Creams for Nulliparous Women with Fibrocystic Breast Disease
description: Cimicifuga racemosa creams have been used to help alleviate symptoms of fibrocystic breast disease. This herbal remedy contains compounds such as actein and 23-deacetylisovaleryl-23-acetate, which may help reduce breast tenderness and swelling. The creams also contain anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe and calm the breast tissue.
